target_app: FocusPomo / App Store 我的番茄 parity + personal productivity layer

layers.name: preflight_and_context
layers.prompt: Verify project directory, prior dogfood state, runtime, and deployment target.

layers.name: product_audit_and_design
layers.prompt: Audit existing FocusPomo flows and design a minimal non-bloated task system based on top-3, Eisenhower, priority, and habit compounding.
quality_gates: process:web research for todo app patterns

layers.name: implementation
layers.prompt: Implement Tasks page, persisted data model, smart top-3 selection, quadrants, task completion stats, and app navigation integration.

layers.name: runtime_verification
layers.prompt: Restart PM2, verify local/public 200, verify served JS includes new task feature, and PWA assets remain healthy.

layers.name: handoff_artifacts
layers.prompt: Update dogfood report/state with implementation and remaining gaps.

gate_results.output: /root/projects/focuspomo exists; package.json/src/ecosystem present; prior dogfood state reviewed.
Chose minimal top-3 + Eisenhower + pomodoro estimates; deferred Google Calendar sync until auth/account model exists.
Next.js build passed with existing middleware deprecation warning only.
local=200 public=200; cf-cache-status DYNAMIC; no-store root headers.
Served JS chunk contains 今日三件事 marker.
SW no root cache.put/root static list; favicon ICO PNG payload; apple-touch icon RGBA 180x180.
Updated state/report artifacts for this run.

implemented: New tasks page in swipe/nav flow between timer and calendar.
Priority labels, pomodoro effort estimates, completion toggles, delete, clear completed.
Smart deterministic top-3 planner that scores importance, urgency, priority, due date, and effort.
Simple split helper for comma/semicolon separated task dumps.
deferred: Real model-backed AI task decomposition requires provider/API route and privacy policy; not shipped as fake UI.
Google account/calendar sync requires auth/sync architecture; not shipped as fake control.
